data.revised_prompt: Cinematic 4:3 poster art for a Hollow Knight mod called DeVect, no text. The Knight is the central figure in a dark ruined Hollow Knight-inspired environment, holding a nail, with a dramatic split of two clearly contrasted power states around them. Left side: lightning form with glowing golden-yellow lightning orbs, electric arcs, fast energetic trails, bright charged highlights, dynamic orbiting motion, one orb bursting outward. Right side: ice form with icy blue orbs, cold mist, crystal shards, shield-like ice petals orbiting around the Knight, dynamic orbiting motion, one orb bursting outward. The composition should imply orb rotation, queued generation, and evocation through magical motion, but NOT look like a UI screenshot. Strong Hollow Knight mood: deep shadows, ancient stone ruins, atmospheric fog, high-contrast magical glow, elegant hand-painted game-poster feel, moody, cinematic, high detail. Keep the Knight iconic and centered, with no modern interface, no guns, no sci-fi armor, no extra orb types, no title text.
